case_title: CHARLIE CHONG VS. NATIONAL SECURITY SERVICES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,425.65 FILED BY CHONG, CHARLIE AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL SECURITY SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-03-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHONG, CHARLIE AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL SECURITY SERVICES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-03-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-03-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. DEFENDANT WAIVE SERVICE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPROTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-03-2008 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-07-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL SECURITY SERVICES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHONG, CHARLIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NATIONAL SECURITY SERVICES THE PARTIES INDEPENDENTLY RESOLVED ISSUES PERTAINING TO CLEANING/USE OF INIFORMS; AND THIS JUDGMENT DOES NOT ADDRESS THAT ISSUE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
